value.Title: =Client Churn Risk Alert - {{ $json.churnRiskCount }} client(s) at risk
value.Description: ={{ $json.churnRiskCount }} client(s) identified with declining health scores. Immediate attention required to prevent churn.
value.Recommended Action: Review at-risk client accounts. Schedule check-in calls. Prepare retention offers if needed.

parameters.content:
## OPT-03: Churn Predictor
Runs Fri 08:00 SAST. Fetches client data from portal,
analyzes 12-week health score trajectory.
Flags clients with slope < -2/week AND score < 50.
Creates escalation + per-client events.
